roa.docketEntryComment: THE COURT ORDERS A GENERAL ORDER FOR RESTITUTION AS TO THE NAMED VICTIMSAND THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION OVER RESTITUTION IN THIS MATTER

/X WET RECKLESS/TWS/CH5  ISS CPROB PROB 18M PJ  1D/CTS  1 /PF145 18/VF2 150/ FOP1:  3  MONTH/X: RESTITUTION PART OF CONDITION OF PROBATION/X: 40 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE TO BE MONITORED BY PRETRIAL DIVERSION/LCHEM/LVAL/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/30    CAPD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNITFOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT: 03-24-20/CONTD: MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30 AND PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT RE- 40 HOUR COMMUNITY SERVICE/DOP/
/CAL:DISPOSITION/AMEND:TO ADD COUNT FIVE 23103VC,MISD PER 23103,5 VC WET RECKLESS/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 5 /NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:SPECIAL APPEARANCE BY JONAH CHEW, FOR ATTORNEY OF RECORD/DAWT/X:COUNSEL HAS 977 AUTHORITY/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/SB:2HR/
/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:PROOF OF COMPLETION PROVIDED/
/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT RE:40 HOURS COMMUNITY SERVICE/DAWT/FAVRPT/CONTD:PROOFOF COMPLETION/DAWF/
/CAL CHANGE OF PLEA/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 28/TRANS 28 FORTHWITH FOR DISPOSITION/
/CAL:DISPOSITION/X:BOTH COUNSELS CANNOT REACH AN AGREEMENT/TEXT:TRANS TODEPT 17/TRANS 17:FORTHWITH FOR CHANGE OF PLEA/
